name: guanyuan-majia
description: Tool-agnostic Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Hermes skill for Guandata BI (观远 BI). Three capabilities: data query & card creation (Part A), ETL governance & write (Part B, incl. SmartETL full-chain rewrite & ExecPlan), custom chart dev & debugging (Part C). Battle-tested with 60+ ETL operations. V1.5.0 refactored into progressive disclosure: SKILL.md is the router (913 lines, ~48 KB), references/ holds detailed playbooks (8 new files). V1.5.1 simplified install path — git is the single source of truth (no npm publish); install via `git clone` + `node bin/install.js install` or `npx github:maojiebc/guanyuan-majia install`.
author: maojiebc

triggers._note: Legacy field kept for backward compatibility. The single source of truth for triggering is SKILL.md frontmatter `description`. All known target agents (Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Hermes) read description, not manifest.triggers — keeping these in sync was overhead. Refresh from SKILL.md description if you intend to consume them.
